subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere brethren! Praise ye the honored elder brother and render service unto him, and strive ye by day and by night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اخوان صفا حضرت برادر بزرگوار را بستااید و خدمت بنمااید و شب و روز بکوشید
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
